old_post_content:
Simple Moisturising Facial Wash 150ml

Experience gentle cleansing with our Simple Moisturising Facial Wash. This non-foaming, fragrance-free formula effectively cleanses and moisturizes your face without disrupting your skin's natural pH balance.

Key Benefits & Ingredients

Our facial wash is designed to gently remove dirt and makeup without stripping your skin of its natural oils. It's also fragrance-free and hypoallergenic, making it suitable for even the most sensitive skin types.

  • Glycerin: Moisturizes and soothes the skin
  • Panthenol: Helps to lock in moisture and support the skin's natural barrier function
  • Lauryl Glucoside: A gentle, plant-derived cleansing agent

How to Use

  1. Wet your face with lukewarm water
  2. Apply a small amount of facial wash to your face, massaging it in a circular motion
  3. Rinse your face thoroughly with lukewarm water
  4. Pat dry with a clean towel
  5. Use a toner and moisturizer as part of your skincare routine

Why Buy from Emart

Our 100% authentic products are sourced directly from Korea and verified by our experienced team. With Emart, you can enjoy fast and reliable Dhaka 1-2 day delivery, as well as the option to pay with Cash on Delivery. Buy with confidence from Emart, your trusted online beauty store in Bangladesh!
